tagline: Award-Winning Pool Service for Monmouth & Middlesex Counties

hero.headline: Award-Winning Pool Care You Can Trust
hero.subheadline: Since 2007, Central New Jersey families have counted on Mystic Pool for reliable, expert pool service. From weekly maintenance to equipment installs, our certified team handles it all so you just dive in.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Complete Pool Care From<br class="hidden md:block"> Open to Close
services.subtitle: From weekly chemical balancing to full equipment installation, Mystic Pool's certified technicians keep your pool sparkling all season long.

cards.title: Weekly & Bi-Weekly Service
cards.description: Comprehensive maintenance including cleaning, chemical testing, skimming, vacuuming, and overall pool health monitoring to keep your water swim-ready all season.

cards.title: Equipment Sales & Install
cards.description: New filters, heaters, and pumps expertly installed, plus fast repair of existing equipment to keep your pool systems running at peak efficiency.

cards.title: Pool Opening & Closing
cards.description: Seasonal opening and winterization services that properly prepare your pool for summer fun and protect your investment through the off-season.

cards.title: Leak Detection & Repair
cards.description: Advanced leak detection techniques that pinpoint problems fast, plus expert repairs to fix leaks before they cause costly damage to your pool area.

cards.title: Safety Cover Installation
cards.description: Authorized Merlin Industries dealer offering premium safety cover sales and installation for complete peace of mind and family protection.

cards.title: Chemicals & Supplies
cards.description: Two retail locations in Old Bridge and Marlboro stocked with a full line of pool chemicals and supplies, plus online ordering for convenience.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to Crystal Clear Water

steps.title: Schedule Your Assessment
steps.description: Call, text, or email us about your pool. We'll provide an honest assessment and no-pressure quote. Reach us however works best for you.

steps.title: Our Certified Team Gets to Work
steps.description: AST and CPO certified technicians arrive on schedule and handle everything — cleaning, chemicals, equipment checks, and repairs. We even train you on basic maintenance.

steps.title: Relax and Enjoy Your Pool
steps.description: Your pool stays crystal clear and swim-ready all season. With two retail locations nearby for supplies and responsive service just a text away, pool ownership is finally easy.

about.label: Why Central NJ Trusts Mystic Pool
about.headline: Privately Owned, Award-Winning, and Certified — Since 2007
about.description: Founded by owner Jay Kellers in 2007, Mystic Pool Service & Supplies has grown into one of the most trusted pool companies in Monmouth and Middlesex Counties. With over 25 years of combined industry experience, AST and CPO certified staff, and two retail locations, we deliver the kind of knowledgeable, responsive service that big franchises simply cannot match. We treat every pool like it is our own.

features.title: NJ Licensed & Insured
features.description: Fully licensed by the NJ Division of Consumer Affairs (License #13VH05021400) with comprehensive insurance for your complete protection.

features.title: Fair Pricing, No Upselling
features.description: We diagnose honestly, price fairly, and never push products or services you do not need. Our reputation depends on your trust.

features.title: Responsive Communication
features.description: Reach us by text, phone, or email. We respond quickly because we know pool issues do not wait for business hours.

pricing.headline: Fair Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Every pool is different. Contact us for an honest quote tailored to your pool's size, condition, and needs — no cookie-cutter pricing.

guarantee.headline: Our "Crystal Clear" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you are not completely satisfied with any service visit, call us and we will come back and make it right at no additional charge. We have built our reputation on doing right by our customers for 19 years, and we are not about to stop now.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve Monmouth and Middlesex Counties including Old Bridge, Marlboro, Manalapan, Howell, Monroe Township, Ocean Township, Long Branch, and surrounding Central New Jersey communities. Visit either of our retail locations in Old Bridge or Marlboro.

faqs.question: Are your technicians certified?
faqs.answer: Yes. Our staff holds both AST (Association of Pool & Spa Professionals) and CPO (Certified Pool Operator) certifications. We are also fully licensed by the NJ Division of Consumer Affairs under License #13VH05021400.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start service?
faqs.answer: Most new clients are scheduled within a few business days. For urgent issues like equipment failures or water chemistry problems, contact us by phone or text and we will work to get you seen as quickly as possible.

faqs.question: Do you sell pool supplies?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We have two retail locations — 161 Texas Rd in Old Bridge and 128 S. Main St in Marlboro — stocked with a complete line of pool chemicals, parts, and supplies. We also offer online ordering for your convenience.

faqs.question: Can you help me learn to maintain my own pool?
faqs.answer: Yes. We believe in customer education. Our staff provides guidance on basic pool maintenance, equipment operation, and chemical balancing so you feel confident managing your pool between service visits.

testimonials.name: Jon A.
testimonials.text: These guys are great. First time pool owner and attempting to balance everything by myself. Staff provided detailed guidance and excellent customer service through multiple follow-ups.

testimonials.name: Meghan M.
testimonials.text: We have always had a great experience with Mystic Pool and everyone who we have ever encountered. The service department is amazing and helpful with questions about equipment.

testimonials.name: Gordon D.
testimonials.text: Incredibly responsive company. They show up at scheduled service times and make staff available via text, phone or email. Knowledgeable staff regarding repairs and solutions.
